sourceAmbiguity: Contact preference copy could either disappear or be over-promoted on every authenticated home.
decisionTaken: Contact preference stays secondary unless PatientIdentityHoldProjection.blocksCurrentAction is true for the current route.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The contact route is promoted only when it blocks the selected patient action, preserving calm home hierarchy.
operationalRisk: Future contact-editor work may conflate Vecells preferences with NHS login, PDS, or GP contact rows.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Keep contact sources separate and promote only the blocker row tied to the current action.
